title: VB6 | SonarQube Cloud Documentation
content:
# VB6

## [Language-specific properties](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/languages/vb6/#language-specific-properties "Language-specific properties")

You can discover and update VB6-specific [properties](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/analysis-parameters/ "properties") in **Administration > General Settings > Languages  > Visual Basic**.

Although `.cls` files can contain VB6 code, they are not analyzed by default in order to avoid clashes with other plugins.
